response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned polyglot engineer with strong TypeScript/Node.js and DLang roots, but the role demands deep Java and Kotlin expertise, Spring ecosystem fluency, and genuine experience with JVM tooling or IDE internals — none of which are meaningfully evidenced in the resume. His only IDE-adjacent experience is a 6-month stint writing C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI, which is architecturally distant from JVM-based enterprise IDE work. Java appears in his skills list but is not a primary language in any described role, and Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, and Hibernate are entirely absent.
strengths: 15+ years of varied engineering experience across backend, mobile, embedded, and developer tooling domains
Some exposure to IDE internals via NI LabWindows/CVI (C IDE), showing awareness of the tooling domain
Active contributor to developer infrastructure (CI, MCP frameworks, open-source libraries), demonstrating a craftsmanship mindset
concerns: Core stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang — Java/Kotlin depth required for this role is not demonstrated
No Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience anywhere in the resume
IDE internals experience is limited to 6 months on a C-based IDE; no JVM language tooling background
